title: Romney says not me: Republican senator is not Democrats' suprise guest
shortDescription: "My guess is that it will be Beyoncé or Taylor Swift," Romney said on X. "So disappointing, I know!"

title: Donald Trump hit at Democrats over 'open borders'
shortDescription: Former President Donald Trump visited the Montezuma Pass in Cochise County, Arizona, where he attacked Kamala Harris on border security.

title: See where the betting odds stood 75 days out in the last 3 elections
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris has the narrowest betting lead of any recent Democratic nominee over Republican Donald Trump 75 days before the vote.

title: Why this woman travels to protest Trump
shortDescription: Demonstrator Nadine Seiler spends the days of the DNC protesting Trump and her nights sleeping in a friend's van.
